1.subtitle: Create an E-commerce Website, Business Profile, Landing Page, and Link-in-bio

2.subtitle: Manage Products, Stock, Manage Orders And Shipping

hero.efficientlyHandlingBusiness: Manage your business more efficiently, reach more buyers, improve agent and reseller performance, all on one platform

innovativeFeature.title: Innovative Features
innovativeFeature.desc: Create E-commerce, manage a reseller team, manage a marketplace, and even create invoices for services. Everything is available on one platform

budget.title: Allocated Budget
budget.desc: Why pay for features you don't use? At Felio.ID, you can activate whatever features you want to use. That way, your dashboard also looks more minimalist

intergratedSystem.title: Integrated System
intergratedSystem.desc: Starting from sales channels, admin chat & marketplace, to CRM. All features integrated in one dashboard!

dataSecurity.title: Data Scurity
dataSecurity.desc: Felio.ID uses experienced third-party payments, so you don't need to worry about your data being leaked!

createWebsites.1: Create a website for all your business needs

buildCustomerTrust.title: Build Customer Trust
buildCustomerTrust.1: The website is part of the brand identity. Having a professional website makes it easier for your customers to trust your brand.
buildCustomerTrust.2: You can create links-in-bio, landing pages, blogs, and even portfolios on Felio.ID.

maximizeCreativity.title: Maximize Your Creativity
maximizeCreativity.1: Start with a template that suits your business, or from a blank page.
maximizeCreativity.2: With more complex web builder features, you can design your website more freely and innovatively.

increaseTraffic.title: Increase Traffic, Increase Sales
increaseTraffic.1: Share your website link on your social media, then monitor your traffic and customer data to find out what they want.
increaseTraffic.2: You can also add product links, or import from #FelioStore.

receivePayment.title: Receive Payments Without Hassle
receivePayment.1: Felio.ID provides a variety of payment methods to make it easier for your customers.
receivePayment.2: You simply install your products from #FelioStore, and start accepting orders.

domainBrand.title: Your Domain, Your Brand
domainBrand.1: Make your website easily recognized with a domain name that suits your business.
domainBrand.2: Felio.ID provides a variety of domain extensions that you need

manageBusiness.title: Manage Business More Efficiently
manageBusiness.desc: Managing stock and product variants in one place, making your work simpler and faster.

serveCustomer.title: Make Your Customers as Comfortable as Possible
serveCustomer.desc: To make customers feel more comfortable shopping, provide the delivery services and payment methods they want on your website via the Felio dashboard.

productPromo.title: The Right Way to Promote Products
productPromo.desc: You can use discounts, promo codes, special categories, and even advertisements to attract buyers to shop at your store.

closerToCustomer.title: Closer To Your Customers
closerToCustomer.1: Monitor your traffic and customer data to find out what they want.
closerToCustomer.2: Also activate the Facebook pixel feature to monitor your ad performance.

cta.title: Register Now And Start Managing Your Business

newsletter.title: Stay Updated with Exclusive Insights!
newsletter.description: Be the first to know about our latest features, improvements, and special offers. Join thousands of business owners who are scaling their success with us!
